items.title: “In Minor Keys” Is the Biennale’s Crown Jewel
items.summary: Also, Aruna d’Souza interviews Australian Pavilion artist Khaled Sabsabi.

items.title: Centuries of Endurance Undergird “In Minor Keys”
items.summary: The main exhibition of the 2026 Venice Biennale sets rage and retribution aside, relaxing the oppressed’s clenched fist for a moment of calm, centeredness, and self-forgiveness.

items.title: Khaled Sabsabi’s Art of Collective Becoming
items.summary: “I believe in the fact that the people hold the power,” the Lebanese-born representing artist of the Australian pavilion told Hyperallergic.

items.title: Paula Kamps, Painter of Rare Sensitivity, Dies at 36
items.summary: This week, we also honor Tess Jaray, luminary of abstraction, and Ben Morea, counterculture icon.
